-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Drammen';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT bygningsnummer, kommunenummer, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '3301';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [flomsoner]
SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

1.description: get Drammen municipality number and geometry

2.description: get buildings in Drammen municipality with geometry

5.description: get quick-clay hazard zones with geometry

6.description: transform flood-building results to metric CRS for distance calculation

7.description: transform quick-clay zones to metric CRS for distance calculation

8.description: calculate distance from each flood-building to nearest quick-clay zone

9.description: sort buildings by distance to quick-clay zone ascending
